'''âz-dh-f-ng''' ('''kazadhfengoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tuberise|tuberise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-dh-f-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tuberise|tuberise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-dh-f-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kazadhfengoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizadhfengoko|thizadhfengoko]] || [[word:jizadhfengoko|jizadhfengoko]] || [[word:shizadhfengoko|shizadhfengoko]] || [[word:kizadhfengoko|kizadhfengoko]]
|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
